summary: DFM saves now use one metadata JSON sidecar per base dataset instance.
details: DFM Results CSV variants can still be saved for different origin/development length configurations, but DFM save now writes the dataset metadata sidecar to the base `<DatasetName>.json` file instead of creating `<DatasetName>@Origin@Development.json` files.
Project Instance cached dataset lookup normalizes older length-scoped CSV and JSON sidecars to the base dataset instance name.
